channel.title: RINGFALL: CHAOS CIRCUIT
channel.description: Release notes for the original neon arcade wrestling game.

item.title: RINGFALL BODYWORKS expands The Volt Dome
item.description: Stable articulated wrestlers, directional full-body throws, elastic rope stiff-arms, corner dives, apron traversal, breakable tables, a larger interactive arena, smarter cameras, mobile controls, optional WebXR, and bounded rematch performance coverage.
